intro: Xantho glabrata, also known as yellow root or yellowroot, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its yellow rhizome and heart-shaped leaves. The health benefits of Xantho glabrata include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of this plant include xanthorhizol, a compound with antimicrobial properties, as well as other volatile oils and phenolic compounds. Xantho glabrata is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs like ginger and peppermint to enhance its medicinal properties.
